DescribeUnplannedEvents.action: Action performed on the instance; for this API the value is: DescribeUnplannedEvents
DescribeUnplannedEvents.serverEventStatus: Event status; supported values: Inquiring, Processing, Executing, Executed, Abnormal, DisConfirm
DescribeUnplannedEvents.productCategory: Product category of the affected instance (BBC / BCC / HPAS)
DescribeUnplannedEvents.serverEventLogTimeFilter: Query events within the periodStartTime and periodEndTime range by event operation log type; supported values: EventCreate, EventAuthorize, EventExecuting, RejectCheckResult
DescribeUnplannedEvents.periodStartTime: Start time for the timeFilter range; if empty, only periodEndTime is applied; must conform to BCE date format
DescribeUnplannedEvents.periodEndTime: End time for the timeFilter range; if empty, only periodStartTime is applied; must conform to BCE date format
DescribeUnplannedEvents.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page; typically no more than 100; default is 10
DescribeUnplannedEvents.marker: Starting event ID for paginated list queries
